chunks.context: Author's professional background as a backend engineer with 8 years in distributed systems
chunks.content:
## About Me

I'm a backend engineer with 8 years of experience building distributed systems. I focus on performance optimization and system reliability.

chunks.context: Python programming skills focusing on data pipelines and REST APIs using FastAPI and Pandas
chunks.content:
### Python

I use Python daily for building data pipelines and REST APIs. My preferred frameworks are FastAPI for APIs and Pandas for data processing.

Key areas of expertise:
- Async programming with asyncio
- Performance profiling and optimization
- Testing with pytest

chunks.context: Go programming skills for high-performance microservices and CLI tools
chunks.content:
### Go

I started using Go 3 years ago for microservices. I appreciate its simplicity and excellent concurrency model.

Main use cases:
- High-throughput API gateways
- CLI tools
- gRPC services

chunks.context: Payment processing system handling 10k TPS using Python business logic and Go gateway
chunks.content:
### Payment Gateway

Built a payment processing system handling 10k transactions per second. Used Python for the business logic layer and Go for the high-performance gateway.

chunks.context: ETL pipeline processing 50GB daily with Apache Airflow orchestration
chunks.content:
### Data Pipeline

Designed an ETL pipeline processing 50GB daily. Used Apache Airflow for orchestration and custom Python operators for transformations.
